name: convert-tool
description: 简单、高效的在线文件格式转换工具集

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = require('./package.json'); ['installer', 'portable'].forEach(dir => fs.mkdirSync('release/' + pkg.version + '/' + dir, { recursive: true }))" && electron-builder
scripts.build:backend: echo 'Building backend (Python)...' && echo 'TODO: Add PyInstaller command here'

author: Your Name
